diagrams.title: Eigenvalues and Eigenvectors
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the geometric interpretation of eigenvalues and eigenvectors.
diagrams.purpose: To help students visualize the concept of eigenvalues and eigenvectors.

diagrams.title: Characteristic Equation
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the relation between the characteristic equation and eigenvalues.
diagrams.purpose: To help students understand the relation between the characteristic equation and eigenvalues.
